ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Payment to PayPal
ham.body:
Hi John,

Your account ending in 1234 was used to send a $50.00 payment to PayPal on March 20, 2026 at 3:15 PM.

If this was not authorized by you, please log in to your online banking and review your recent activity. For your security, we have temporarily frozen the account until we verify the transaction.

If you recognize this transaction, no action is required. If you do not, contact our support team immediately.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best,
Banking Services Team
Your Bank

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: HR Payroll System Maintenance
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

I am writing from the Human Resources Department regarding an urgent payroll update that affects all staff. Our payroll system will undergo a scheduled maintenance on Thursday, 12 April 2026, and we have detected an issue that requires your immediate attention.

Please verify your personal details by accessing the HR portal and confirming the following information: employee number, bank account number, and tax identification number. Failure to do so will result in a delay in your upcoming salary disbursement.

To complete the verification, log in to the portal at <URL> and follow the on-screen instructions. The deadline is 9:00 AM on Friday, 13 April 2026. If you do not comply, your salary will be withheld until the issue is resolved.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Best regards,
[Manager Name]
HR Compliance Officer
[Company Name]
Phone: +1 800‑555‑1234
